zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex於1190年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex28歲，母親Beatrice Say Countess of Essex22歲。她於大約1200年與Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年8月27日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年46歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex于1190年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex28岁，母亲Beatrice Say Countess of Essex22岁。她于大约1200年与Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年8月27日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年46岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex was born in 1190, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, was 28 and her mother, Beatrice Say Countess of Essex, was 22. She married Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford about 1200. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 August 1236, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex est née en 1190, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Say Countess of Essex, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 août 1236, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex 1190 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex 28 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Say Countess of Essex 22. Sie hat um 1200 Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. August 1236 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex è nata il nel 1190 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Say Countess of Essex, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1236, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essexが1190年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essexは28歳，母Beatrice Say Countess of Essexは22歳であった。約1200年にHenry de Bohun 1st Earl of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年8月27日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで46歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Llanthony Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 프리마 프리오리
ko.lifeSummary: Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex(이)가 1190년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Say Countess of Essex(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 8월 27일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 프리마 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex nasceu em 1190, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Say Countess of Essex, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1236, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Llanthony Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales: ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex родилась в 1190 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Say Countess of Essex, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 августа 1236 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
